description: Create a comprehensive GitHub Actions workflow named Continuous Integration that performs linting, testing, and releasing of a project on multiple platforms. Trigger on push to master, dev, and feature branches, as well as on pull requests to master and dev. The workflow consists of three jobs: lint, test, and release. The lint job checks code formatting and dependencies, while the test job runs on multiple operating systems and configurations, performing tasks such as building, testing, and validating the project. The release job creates a GitHub release with artifacts.
